title: Civil procedure
doc_html:
§2487.18.  Civil procedure

The civil jurisdiction of the city court and the pleading, practice and procedure followed, including appellate procedure, shall be governed by the applicable provisions of the Louisiana Code of Civil Procedure.  

Acts 1964, No. 102, §18.
